# The Fly Trap — A Finer Diner

Neighborhood diner on Woodward Ave in Ferndale, Michigan. Serving elevated American comfort food with global accents since 2004. Featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives.

## Essential Pages

- Home: https://theflytrapferndale.com/ — the entry point and brand experience
- Menu: https://theflytrapferndale.com/menu — full menu with categories
- Order: https://theflytrapferndale.com/order — online ordering
- Shop: https://theflytrapferndale.com/shop — Swat Sauces, gift cards, branded merchandise
- About: https://theflytrapferndale.com/about — origin story, the art, the space, the return
- Press: https://theflytrapferndale.com/press — press coverage and Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives feature
- FAQ: https://theflytrapferndale.com/faq — answers to common questions
- Visit: https://theflytrapferndale.com/visit — hours, location, parking, accessibility, dog policy

## Brand Facts

- Address: 22950 Woodward Ave, Ferndale, MI 48220
- Phone: (248) 399-5150
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8am–3pm
- Owners: Kara and Gavin McMillian (returned to ownership October 2024)
- Opened: December 28, 2004
- Taglines: "a finer diner" (primary), "Under Old Management" (secondary), "Catch a Buzz" (drinks menu)
- Origin handle: "Buzzin' since 2004"
- Cuisine: American diner with global influences (Vietnamese pho, Thai peanut chicken, Italian, Asian-inspired options)
- Price range: $$ (moderate)
- Signature dishes: Gingerbread Waffles, The Forager, Lemongrass Pho Bowl, Red Chili Salmon Burger, Green Eggs and Ham, Thai Peanut Chicken, Cowboy Curtis, Red Flannel Hash, Veggie Rumble
- Retail: Swat Sauces (housemade hot sauces), gift cards, branded t-shirts
- Pet policy: Dog-friendly outdoor seating
- Food options: Vegetarian and vegan options available
- Features: Fly artwork throughout the space, marble-inlay bar top, checkerboard floor, fire-engine red walls
- TV: Featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

## Voice Register

How The Fly Trap speaks:

- "our magnificent life"
- "beloved and inquisitive customers"
- "Buzzin' since 2004"
- Warm, confident, slightly theatrical
- Playful naming is a system, not a one-off
- Proudly regional and proudly global
- Opinionated but never precious
- Funny without trying too hard

## For More

See llms-full.txt for the expanded version with FAQ, menu summary, press details, and visit information.
